description: Solid-phase STL of the Diamond TPMS cold plate geometry. Generated by inverting the fluid-binary volume and padding with one voxel of fluid on all six faces, then applying marching-cubes isosurface extraction at level=0.5. The result is the closed solid metal body with internal TPMS channels as enclosed voids. Inlet/outlet ports must be added by the AM vendor or CAD post-processing step before slicing; port locations to be specified in the build specification (OI-04).
world_scale_note: 1 voxel = 0.25 mm; 20 voxels x 0.25 mm/voxel = 5.0 mm per side
generation_method: numpy.pad(volume, 1, constant_values=1) → invert to solid phase → skimage.measure.marching_cubes(solid_phase, level=0.5, spacing=(0.25, 0.25, 0.25))

also_generated.fluid_channel_stl_note: Fluid-domain surface STL from Stage 3 export; 573 open boundary edges at channel exit faces (expected for open coolant-channel geometry). Not watertight; DO NOT transmit to AM vendor without mesh capping.

note_for_vendor: This STL represents the solid Al metal body (TPMS walls + surrounding material). Internal channels are enclosed voids. Before slicing: (1) add inlet/outlet ports per build specification OI-04; (2) confirm powder evacuation access per OI-04 §d; (3) verify minimum feature size ≤ 0.5 mm per OI-04 §b.
